---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE]"
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

## 💡 Is your feature request related to a problem or frustration?
A clear and concise description of what the current limitation is. 
*(e.g., "I am frustrated when I have to click three times just to change the responsive breakpoint view, which slows down my design workflow.")*

## 🚀 Proposed Enhancement
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Describe the new UI element, shortcut, or tweak you would like to see added to the Builderius interface.

## 🎨 Design Concept / Mockups (If Applicable)
If you have a visual idea of how this enhancement should look, please share it here. This could be a rough sketch, a screenshot with annotations, or an example from another builder/software.

- **Mockups/Examples:** [Drop files here or paste links]

## 🛠️ Use Case & Benefit
How would this feature improve your daily workflow or the workflows of other Builderius users? 
*(e.g., "This would save time for developers who frequently build complex layouts and need quick access to the custom CSS panel.")*

## 🔄 Alternative Solutions Considered
A description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've tried or considered (e.g., using custom browser extensions or specific keyboard macros).

## 📌 Additional Context
Add any other context, links to documentation, or references about the feature request here.
